mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T.*, ROWNUM AS RNO FROM ( SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT,
NVL ( ( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '/images/no_image.png' ) AS IMG_URL,
NVL ( ( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '택배' ) AS PLACE_NAME,
NVL ( ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEM_ID = #{loginUserEmail} ), 0 ) AS WISHED, CASE WHEN PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CAN_ACCESS_DETAIL
0 AS WISHED, 0 AS CAN_ACCESS_DETAIL
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('판매중', '예약중', '판매완료') ORDER BY PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T.*, ROWNUM AS RNO FROM ( SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT,
NVL ( ( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '/images/no_image.png' ) AS IMG_URL,
NVL ( ( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '택배' ) AS PLACE_NAME,
NVL ( ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO ), 0 ) AS WISH_COUNT,
NVL ( ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEM_ID = #{loginUserEmail} ), 0 ) AS WISHED, CASE WHEN PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CAN_ACCESS_DETAIL
0 AS WISHED, 0 AS CAN_ACCESS_DETAIL
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('판매중', '예약중', '판매완료') ORDER BY WISH_COUNT DESC, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT DESC, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= 5 )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT T.*, ROWNUM AS RNO FROM ( SELECT PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NAME, PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_PRICE, PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE, PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS, PRODUCTS.REG_DATE, PRODUCTS.VIEW_COUNT,
NVL ( ( SELECT PRODUCT_IMAGE.IMG_URL FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE WHERE PRODUCT_IMAGE.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND PRODUCT_IMAGE.IS_MAIN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '/images/no_image.png' ) AS IMG_URL,
NVL ( ( SELECT PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PLACE_NAME FROM PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION WHERE PRODUCT_MEET_LOCATION.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '택배' ) AS PLACE_NAME,
NVL ( ( SELECT 1 FROM WISHLIST WHERE WISHLIST.PRODUCT_NO = PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_NO AND WISHLIST.MEM_ID = #{loginUserEmail} ), 0 ) AS WISHED, CASE WHEN PRODUCTS.SELLER_EMAIL = #{loginUserEmail} THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS CAN_ACCESS_DETAIL
0 AS WISHED, 0 AS CAN_ACCESS_DETAIL
FROM PRODUCTS WHERE PRODUCTS.SALE_TYPE = '나눔' AND PRODUCTS.TRADE_STATUS IN ('판매중', '예약중', '판매완료') ORDER BY PRODUCTS.REG_DATE DESC ) T WHERE ROWNUM <= 10 )
